memberdef.name: COPYABLE_TYPE
memberdef.initializer: type_(const type_ &other) = default; \ type_ &operator=(const type_ &other) = default;

memberdef.name: NON_COPYABLE_TYPE
memberdef.initializer: type_(const type_ &other) = delete; \ type_ &operator=(const type_ &other) = delete;

memberdef.name: PINNED_TYPE
memberdef.initializer: type_(const type_ &other) = delete; \ type_ &operator=(const type_ &other) = delete; \ type_(type_ &&other) = delete; \ type_ &operator=(type_ &&other) = delete;
